productDetail.pickupHelper: We will confirm the pickup location after order.

sections.title: 1. Definitions
sections.content: In this Agreement, 'Platform' refers to Occasions Gifts. 'Partner' refers to the merchant store applying to sell goods. 'Customer' refers to the end-user purchasing goods via the Platform. 'Goods' refers to flowers, gifts, bakery items, or other products listed by the Partner.

sections.title: 2. Scope of Service
sections.content: Occasions Gifts provides a digital marketplace connecting Partners with Customers, specifically targeting the diaspora community. The Platform facilitates ordering, payment processing, and notification services.

sections.title: 3. Partner Obligations
sections.content: The Partner agrees to maintain accurate product listings, ensure high-quality goods, and fulfill orders within the agreed timeframes. The Partner must possess all necessary licenses to operate in their local jurisdiction.

sections.title: 4. Platform Obligations
sections.content: The Platform agrees to maintain the website/app, market the Partner's goods to potential Customers, process payments securely, and remit earnings to the Partner according to the payout schedule.

sections.title: 5. Products and Pricing
sections.content: The Partner retains the right to set prices for their Goods. Prices listed on the Platform must be inclusive of all applicable local taxes (e.g., VAT). The Platform may apply a markup or service fee visible to the Customer.

sections.title: 6. Orders and Fulfillment
sections.content: The Partner must acknowledge new orders within 2 hours during business hours. Failure to fulfill accepted orders may result in penalties or suspension of the Partner account.

sections.title: 7. Delivery
sections.content: The Partner is responsible for the delivery of Goods to the recipient unless otherwise agreed. The Partner must ensure Goods are delivered in pristine condition and obtain proof of delivery (e.g., photo or signature).

sections.title: 8. Fees and Commission
sections.content: The Platform charges a commission of 20% on the gross value of products sold. Delivery fees collected from the Customer are passed to the Partner in full, minus any transaction processing fees if applicable.

sections.title: 9. Payments and Payouts
sections.content: Payouts are processed monthly on the 15th day of the following month for all completed orders. Payouts are made via bank transfer to the account specified by the Partner.

sections.title: 10. Refunds and Disputes
sections.content: If a Customer reports damaged or missing Goods, the Platform will investigate. If the Partner is found at fault, the cost of the refund will be deducted from the Partner's payout.

sections.title: 11. Intellectual Property
sections.content: The Partner grants the Platform a non-exclusive license to use the Partner's brand name, logo, and product images for marketing and operational purposes within the scope of this Agreement.

sections.title: 12. Confidentiality
sections.content: Both parties agree to keep confidential any proprietary information, customer data, or business insights obtained during the term of this partnership.

sections.title: 13. Term and Termination
sections.content: This Agreement is effective upon acceptance and remains in force until terminated. Either party may terminate with 30 days' written notice. The Platform reserves the right to terminate immediately for breach of terms.

sections.title: 14. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: The Platform is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the service. The Platform's total liability is limited to the fees earned from the Partner in the prior 3 months.

sections.title: 15. Governing Law
sections.content: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which the Partner is registered (Albania, Kosovo, or North Macedonia).

poSubheadline: Connect with the diaspora and help them send love home. Join our network of premium local vendors in Albania, Kosovo, and North Macedonia.
poWhyDesc: We handle the technology and marketing so you can focus on what you do best—creating amazing gifts.
poBenGlobalDesc: Access thousands of customers living abroad who want to support local businesses.
poBenPaymentsDesc: We handle all international payments and fraud protection. You get paid locally.
poBenDeliveryDesc: You manage local delivery on your terms, setting your own radius and fees.
poBenRevenueDesc: Keep 80% of every sale. We only make money when you make money.
poStep1Desc: Fill out the simple application form with your store details.
poStep2Desc: Our team verifies your business within 24-48 hours.
poStep3Desc: List your flowers, cakes, or gifts with photos and prices.
poStep4Desc: Get notified instantly when a customer places an order.
poTrustedBy: Trusted by local businesses across the Balkans
chkCommission: I understand the platform charges 20% commission on product sales. I keep 80% + delivery fees.
chkPayout: I agree to monthly payouts on the 15th of the following month.
chkTerms: I have read and agree to the Partner Terms & Conditions.
msgAppReceived: We have received your store application.
pgSubtitle: Everything you need to know about managing your store on Occasions Gifts.
pgSecApprovalText: Once you submit your application, our team verifies your business details. This usually takes 24-48 hours.
pgSecApprovalSub: We check for a valid business license and social media presence.
pgSecAddProdIntro: Your catalog is what customers see first. Make it shine.
pgSecAddProdStep1: Log in to your Store Portal.
pgSecAddProdStep3: Upload a high-quality square image (1000x1000px recommended).
pgSecAddProdStep4: Add a clear title and description.
pgSecAddProdStep5: Set your price in EUR (system auto-converts for customers).
pgSecManageText: When you receive an order, you will get an email and a notification in your portal. You must accept the order to confirm you can fulfill it.
pgSecProofCrit: CRITICAL: You must take a photo of the delivery.
pgSecProofText: This protects you from claims of non-delivery. Upload the photo to the order details page to mark it as 'Completed'.
pgSecPayoutsCalc: We calculate your payout as: (Total Sales - 20% Commission) + Delivery Fees.
pgSecSupportText: Our partner support team is available 9 AM - 6 PM daily.
psPendingDesc: Thanks for applying! Our team is currently reviewing your details. This usually takes 24-48 hours. You'll receive an email update soon.
psApprovedDesc: You can now log in to your store portal to add products and manage orders.
psRejectedDesc: Unfortunately, we couldn't approve your application at this time. Please check your email for specific reasons and next steps.
ftPartnerDesc: Grow your business by reaching customers worldwide.
sympathyHubSubtitle: Send comfort and care across any distance.
msgNeutral: Thinking of you during this difficult time. Sending comfort and support.
msgMuslim: May Allah grant them peace and ease their pain. We are with you.
msgChristian: Our thoughts and prayers are with you and your family.
footerText: Connecting diaspora with their homeland, one gift at a time.
heroSubtitle: The easiest way to send gifts to Albania, Kosovo, and North Macedonia.
emotionalMessage: Distance means so little when someone means so much.
addGiftsMessage: Looks like you haven't added any gifts yet.
termsAgreement: By placing this order, you agree to our Terms of Service.
orderPlacedDesc: Thank you for your order. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
universalCardDesc: Can be used at any store on our platform.
storeSpecificDesc: Valid only for a specific vendor.
recipientEmailDesc: We'll send the code directly to them (optional).
step1: 1. Choose your card type and amount.
step4: 4. Receive a unique digital code instantly.
step5: 5. Recipient enters code at checkout to redeem.
haveCode: Have a gift card code? Check your balance or claim it now.
invalidCodeDesc: The code you entered is invalid or has expired.
sameDayDeliveryNote: Order by 2 PM for same-day delivery in major cities.
noSympathyItems: No sympathy items found matching your criteria.
loginToContinue: Login to continue to your account
thankYouOrder: Thank you for your order. We've sent a confirmation email to you.
chooseDateMessage: You must choose a delivery date before adding to cart.
contactAdmin: Please contact administrator if you believe this is an error.
sympathyDesc: Express your condolences with dignity and care. Send flowers, wreaths, and support baskets to loved ones in Albania, Kosovo, and North Macedonia.
invalidAmountDesc: Please enter an amount between €20 and €200.
giveChoice: Give the gift of choice with our digital gift cards. Perfect for any occasion and valid at all our partner stores.

loyalty.title: Join Occasions Gifts Loyalty Club
loyalty.subtitle: Earn points on every gift, unlock exclusive rewards, and make every occasion more special.

familyBonus.title: The Family Bonus
familyBonus.description: Send 5 gifts to the same family address and earn a massive +1500 point bonus automatically!
